mapper.sql: id, title, name, check_status, sponsor_unit, address, start_date, end_date, expected_start_date, expected_end_date, train_number, meeting_fee_amt, material_fee_amt, hotel_fee_amt, traffic_fee_amt, other_fee_amt, funds_account, train_code, parter_id, parter_name, parter_duty, parter_title, parter_dept_id, parter_account, creator, creator_name, create_time, file_ids, note, sub_flag, sub_user_id, sub_date, sub_time
mapper.select: select sart.id as rowId , sart.name as name,sart.sub_flag as subFlag, sart.title as title,sart.train_code as trainCode,sart.address,sart.start_date as startDate,sart.end_date as endDate, csru.code as "sponsorUnit.id",csru.name as "sponsorUnit.name",csru.name as sponsorUnitName, puser.id as "parterId.id",puser.name as "parterId.name",puser.name as parterName,sart.parter_duty as parterDuty, ccsti.code as "parterTitle.id",ccsti.name as "parterTitle.name", sdept.id as "parterDeptId.id",sdept.name as "parterDeptId.name", sart.parter_account as parterAccount,sart.note as note,sart.expected_start_date as expectedStartDate, sart.expected_end_date as expectedEndDate,sart.train_number as trainNumber, sart.meeting_fee_amt as meetingFeeAmt,sart.material_fee_amt as materialFeeAmt, sart.hotel_fee_amt as hotelFeeAmt,sart.traffic_fee_amt as trafficFeeAmt,sart.other_fee_amt as otherFeeAmt, sart.funds_account as fundsAccount,cuser.name as creator_name,sart.create_time,sart.check_status from srm_ac_research_train sart left join ct_srm_rely_unit csru on csru.code=sart.sponsor_unit left join ct_srm_user puser on puser.id=sart.parter_id left join ct_srm_user cuser on cuser.id=sart.creator left join ct_srm_title_info ccsti on ccsti.code=sart.parter_title left join ct_srm_dept sdept on sdept.id=sart.parter_dept_id where sart.id=#{rowId}

select sart.id as rowId , sart.name as name,sart.sub_flag as subFlag, sart.title as title,sart.train_code as trainCode,sart.address,sart.start_date as startDate,sart.end_date as endDate, csru.name as sponsorUnitName, puser.name as parterName,sart.parter_duty as parterDuty, ccsti.name as parterTitleName, sdept.name as parterDeptName, sart.parter_account as parterAccount,sart.note as note,sart.expected_start_date as expectedStartDate, sart.expected_end_date as expectedEndDate,sart.train_number as trainNumber, sart.meeting_fee_amt as meetingFeeAmt,sart.material_fee_amt as materialFeeAmt, sart.hotel_fee_amt as hotelFeeAmt,sart.traffic_fee_amt as trafficFeeAmt,sart.other_fee_amt as otherFeeAmt, sart.funds_account as fundsAccount from srm_ac_research_train sart left join ct_srm_rely_unit csru on csru.code=sart.sponsor_unit left join ct_srm_user puser on puser.id=sart.parter_id left join ct_srm_title_info ccsti on ccsti.code=sart.parter_title left join ct_srm_dept sdept on sdept.id=sart.parter_dept_id left join cf_srm_eaf_rec eafrec on eafrec.sys_no="P043" and eafrec.check_rec_id=sart.id where eafrec.step_no>1
and sart.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{acResearchTrainDto.name}, '%')
and sart.sub_date >= #{acResearchTrainDto.startDate}
and sart.sub_date <= #{acResearchTrainDto.endDate}
and ( (sart.sub_flag="1" and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{acResearchTrainDto.userId}, '|%')) or (eafrec.step_no = (select max(step_no) from cf_srm_eaf_rec seafrec where seafrec.sys_no="P043" and seafrec.check_rec_id=sart.id) and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{acResearchTrainDto.userId}, '|%') and eafrec.check_datetime is not null) or (sart.sub_flag="0" and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.check_result=3 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{acResearchTrainDto.userId}, '|%')) )
and sart.sub_flag="1" and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{acResearchTrainDto.userId}, '|%')
and sart.sub_flag="1" and eafrec.check_result="2" and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{acResearchTrainDto.userId}, '|%')
and sart.sub_flag="0" and eafrec.check_result="3" and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{acResearchTrainDto.userId}, '|%')
